payload.question:
Google Sign-In + SAF backup/restore implemented.

Build: SUCCESS
Backend tests: ALL PASSED
Code review: CONCERNS

Review issues: ["PII logging in GoogleSignInManager (Log.d with email/name)","Import not wrapped in Room transaction (data loss risk on crash)","exportToUri silent failure when outputStream is null","Nav start destination always Transactions regardless of auth state"]

Approve to version bump, build APK, and release?
payload.title: Google Sign-In + Drive Backup Review
